data.title: Acotec Scientific Holdings Announces 2025 Annual General Meeting
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An announcement from Acotec Scientific Holdings Limited ( (HK:6669) ) is now available.

Acotec Scientific Holdings Limited, a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, has announced its annual general meeting scheduled for June 30, 2025, in Beijing. The meeting will address several key resolutions, including the adoption of the company’s audited financial statements for 2024, the re-election of directors, and the re-appointment of KPMG as auditors. Additionally, the board will seek approval to allot and issue additional shares and securities, which could impact the company’s capital structure and shareholder value.

More about Acotec Scientific Holdings Limited

data.title: First Sentier Acquires Substantial Holding in Cettire Ltd.
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Cettire Ltd. ( (AU:CTT) ) has shared an update.

Cettire Ltd. has announced that First Sentier Investors RQI Pty Ltd, a wholly-owned subsidiary of First Sentier Investors Holdings Pty Limited, has acquired a substantial holding in the company. This acquisition includes 19,705,097 fully paid ordinary shares, giving First Sentier a significant voting power of 5.17%. This move reflects a strategic investment by Mitsubishi UFJ Financial Group, which indirectly owns First Sentier, potentially impacting Cettire’s market positioning and shareholder dynamics.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:CTT) stock is a Sell with a A$1.30 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cettire Ltd. stock, see the AU:CTT Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Hon Hai Precision Industry Announces NT$80.57 Billion Cash Dividend
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Hon Hai Precision Industry ( (HNHPF) ) has provided an announcement.

Hon Hai Precision Industry has announced a significant cash dividend distribution to its common shareholders, amounting to NT$80.57 billion, which translates to NT$5.8 per share. The ex-dividend date is set for July 2, 2025, with the payment date scheduled for July 31, 2025. This move underscores the company’s robust financial health and commitment to returning value to its shareholders. Shareholders are encouraged to register for electronic notifications of dividend payouts, and any changes to the dividend payout ratio due to bond conversions will be announced separately.

More about Hon Hai Precision Industry

Hon Hai Precision Industry Co., Ltd., also known as Foxconn, is a leading player in the electronics manufacturing industry. The company is renowned for its production of electronic components and products, serving major technology firms worldwide. Foxconn’s market focus includes consumer electronics, cloud computing, and smart devices.

Take and Give. Needs Co., Ltd. ( (JP:4331) ) has issued an announcement.

Take and Give Needs Co., Ltd. announced it has met the continued listing criteria for the Tokyo Stock Exchange’s Prime Market as of May 13, 2025. The company addressed a previous non-compliance issue related to the market capitalization of tradable shares by ensuring trading activity and adjusting its base date, thereby securing its position on the Prime Market and committing to enhancing corporate value.

data.title: Biocytogen Secures Japan Patent for RenMab Platform, Strengthening Global IP Strategy
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

The latest announcement is out from Biocytogen Pharmaceuticals (Beijing) Co. Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2315) ).

Biocytogen Pharmaceuticals has secured a patent in Japan for its RenMab™ fully human antibody mouse platform, marking a significant milestone in its global intellectual property strategy. This achievement enhances the company’s competitive edge in the biotech industry, as the RenMice platform has already generated numerous licensing agreements and high-potential therapeutic candidates, underscoring its substantial commercial value and global recognition.

More about Biocytogen Pharmaceuticals (Beijing) Co. Ltd. Class H

Biocytogen Pharmaceuticals (Beijing) Co., Ltd. is a company in the biotech and biopharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development of fully human antibody discovery platforms. Their primary products include the RenMice platform series, which is recognized for its ability to discover fully human antibodies and TCRs with low immunogenicity and high diversity. The company has established licensing agreements with major companies like Merck KGaA and Janssen/Johnson & Johnson.

data.title: GTI Energy Retracts Lo Herma Uranium Production Targets
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

GTI Resources Ltd ( (AU:GTR) ) has issued an update.

GTI Energy Ltd has retracted its previous production targets and financial forecasts related to its Lo Herma Scoping Study after consultations with the ASX revealed insufficient basis for the forward-looking statements. The company advises investors not to base their decisions on these announcements and is planning a new drilling program to enhance the confidence level in its mineral resource estimates and expand the deposit.

More about GTI Resources Ltd

GTI Energy Ltd operates in the energy sector, focusing on uranium resources. The company is involved in exploring and developing low-cost uranium extraction methods, particularly through in-situ recovery (ISR) techniques.

H.I.S.Co. ( (JP:9603) ) just unveiled an announcement.

H.I.S. Co., Ltd. has announced the establishment of a new subsidiary, H.I.S. SAUDI ARABIA LLC, through its consolidated subsidiary, H.I.S. Management Consulting DMCC. This move is part of the company’s strategy to expand its sales channels and create new customers in the global market, particularly in Saudi Arabia, where tourism is becoming a key industry. The impact on the company’s business performance is expected to be minor, but it positions H.I.S. to capitalize on the growing tourism sector in Saudi Arabia.
